immediate.en: Inspect nearby plots. Quarantine affected rows to prevent airborne spore dispersion.
immediate.am: የአቅራቢያ ማሳዎችን ይመርምሩ። በአየር የሚተላለፉ ስፖሮች ስርጭትን ለመከላከል የተጎዱትን ረድፎች ለይተው ያስቀምጡ።

organic.en: Broadcast compost teas to strengthen general plant immunity; select rust-resistant varieties next season.
organic.am: አጠቃላይ የእፅዋትን በሽታ የመከላከል አቅም ለማጠናከር የኮምፖስት ሻይ ይረጩ ፤ በሚቀጥለው የውድድር ዘመን ዝገትን የሚቋቋሙ ዝርያዎችን ይምረጡ።

chemical.en: Apply systemic triazole fungicides immediately if rust cover exceeds 5% of leaf area.
chemical.am: የዝገቱ ሽፋን ከ 5% በላይ ከሆነ ወዲያውኑ የትራይዞል ፈንገስ ማጥፊያዎችን ይተግብሩ።

immediate.en: Hand-pick and burn black, mummified berries remaining on the twigs.
immediate.am: በቅርንጫፎቹ ላይ የቀሩትን ጥቁር እና የደረቁ ፍሬዎችን በእጅ በመልቀም ያቃጥሉ።

organic.en: Prune shade trees to open the canopy, allowing sunshine to dry the branches.
organic.am: የፀሐይ ብርሃን ቅርንጫፎቹን ለማድረቅ እንዲችል የጥላ ዛፎችን ይቁረጡ።

chemical.en: Copper hydroxide spraying every 4 weeks during early rainfall triggers.
chemical.am: በመጀመሪያው የዝናብ ወቅት በየ 4 ሳምንቱ የኮፐር ሃይድሮክሳይድ ርጭት ያድርጉ።

immediate.en: Remove residue from previous crop seasons; rotate with legumes.
immediate.am: የቀደሙትን የሰብል ወቅቶች ቅሪቶች ያስወግዱ ፤ ከአተር እና ባቄላ ሰብሎች ጋር በየተራ ይዝሩ።

organic.en: Ensure optimal spacing between plants to maximize aeration.
organic.am: የአየር ዝውውርን ከፍ ለማድረግ በእፅዋት መካከል ጥሩ ርቀትን ያረጋግጡ።

chemical.en: Foliar application of strobilurin-based spray protects early leaf canopy.
chemical.am: ስትሮቢሉሪን ላይ የተመሰረተ ፈሳሽ በመርጨት ቅጠሉን አስቀድሞ መከላከል ይቻላል።

title.en: Identify Crop Diseases with Cloud Precision

description.en: Detect pests, fungal infections, and nutrient deficiencies in seconds. Our AI models are trained on millions of high-resolution agricultural datasets across Ethiopia.
description.am: በሽታዎችን፣ የተባይ ጥቃቶችን እና የአልሚ ምግብ እጥረቶችን በሰከንዶች ውስጥ ይለዩ። የእኛ የ AI ሞዴሎች በመላው ኢትዮጵያ በሚሊዮን በሚቆጠሩ ከፍተኛ ጥራት ባላቸው የግብርና መረጃዎች የሰለጠኑ ናቸው።

trustedBy.am: ከ 5,000+ በላይ በሆኑ አርሶ አደሮች የታመነ

subtitle.en: Select one of our preset templates below to simulate leaf analysis.
subtitle.am: ቅጠልን ለመተንተን ከታች ካሉት አማራጮች አንዱን ይምረጡ።

subtitle.en: Connecting to AgriEthio Cloud Neural Engine. Comparing patterns...
subtitle.am: ከአግሪ ኢትዮ ደመና የነርቭ ሞዴል ጋር በመገናኘት ላይ። ቅጦችን በማነጻጸር ላይ...

workflow.title: Simple Diagnostic Workflow
workflow.subtitle: Our streamlined 3-step process connects ancestral field knowledge with cloud-based diagnostic intelligence.

steps.title: 1. Capture Photo
steps.description: Take a clear, well-lit photo of the affected plant part, focusing on lesions or pests.

steps.title: 2. AI Analysis
steps.description: Our neural networks analyze texture, color, and pattern to identify the specific pathogen.

steps.title: 3. Treatment Plan
steps.description: Receive a localized treatment protocol, including organic and chemical recommendations.

recentScans.title: Recent Field Scans
recentScans.subtitle: Live feed of diagnostic activity across your network.
